description: Create a node. The node is created in the supplied position v3 (3D vector coordinates).

keywords.name: tolerance-merge
keywords.description: The node creation is canceled if there are existing nodes within a tolerance f from the position.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the created node the group name s1 (in slot s2 if provided, in slot Default if not). Use of the group logic is described in the Groups topic.
